title: Remembering a Music Star: Dot Rotten
summary: Dot Rotten was a famous grime music star who died at 37 years old. His family told the BBC about his death, and he might have died in Gambia. He was born Joseph Ellis in London and started making music when he was just seven years old. He made a big hit song called Overload in 2012, which he said came from his feelings of sadness. Dot Rotten worked with many other singers like Ed Sheeran and Cher Lloyd. He changed his name from Young Dot to Dot Rotten, which had a special meaning. People are sharing kind words to remember him for his music and how he helped shape grime music.

keywords.explanation: a type of fast music from London

background_read: Dot Rotten was a musician who made grime music, which is a popular style from London. He started making music as a child and became famous for his songs and work with other artists. His death has made many people sad, and they are remembering his contributions to music.
Article_Structure: WHO: Dot Rotten, a grime music star
WHAT: He died at age 37, and people are paying tributes
WHERE: He was born in London and might have died in Gambia
WHY: He is remembered for his hit songs and influence on grime music

perspectives.description: Dot Rotten is seen as an important figure in grime music for his unique sound and hit songs.
